title: Reina Gale

{{Quote|Lando Calrissian? Yeah, I've heard of him. He's pretty good at what he does. Course, being a close friend to those clean-cut, upper-crust, New Republic-types has ruined what could have amounted to a perfectly good rep. Me? Heck, if it pays credits, I'll do business with anyone, no questions asked.|Reina Gale|<ref name="AJ3" />}}
'''Reina Gale''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] swindler and deal maker residing on [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]] in the early days of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] where she and her friend [[Rollos]] were always on the look to strike deals with anyone who could pay them.

==Biography==
As a child, Reina and her parents traveled from an unknown planet to the [[Minavar system/Legends|Minavar system]] on a colony expedition. Her family died, along with most of the colony population, a few years after because of a vicious virus, and she was placed in the custody of her uncle, a gambler, who eventually lost his entire fortune to a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]. The gambler took everything in the uncle's possession — including Reina, who the Hutt sold into [[Slavery/Legends|slavery]].<ref name="AJ3" />

Reina remained in the possession of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] slave master for nearly twelve years till one day she befriended the [[Gigoran/Legends|Gigoran]] Rollos, a new slave sold to the imperial by something as unusual as a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] slaver. Being the only one in the slave camp who understood the Gigorian language, she befriended Rollos. Displeased with their friendship, the Imperial slavemaster ordered Rollos punished and Reina killed, but Rollos, sensing that his new friend was in danger, ended up single-handedly destroying the entire slave camp, and together Reina and Rollos made it off-planet in a stolen spaceship.<ref name="AJ3" />

[[File:Begas_Tok.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Begas Tok]] on [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]].]]

Reina and Rollos were inseparable and the best of friends. Reina was clever and extremely mischievous, having a knack for making deals that she and her friend benefited from greatly.<ref name="AJ3" />

===Dealing with Begas Tok===
In the years following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Reina Gale and Rollos went to [[Entralla/Legends|Entralla]] in order to sell [[Zipthar hexa-crystal]]s to [[Begas Tok]]. The deal was interrupted by the intervention of the [[Pentastar Patrol]]. In fact, it was Tok who denounced the smugglers to the police. He wanted to recover both the crystals and the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. Tok wasn't worried by the police because he was permitted to conduct trade in hexa-crystals. Reina Gale and Rollos were tracked in [[Nexus City]] but eventually managed to escape.<ref name="AJ3" />

===Hired by the Red Moons===
Attempting to find a place to hide for the night, Gale was grabbed by [[Andrephan Stormcaller]] and pulled into a dark courtyard. Rollos was knocked out by [[Hugo Cutter]] using a [[bioinduction gun]]. Stormcaller kept her quiet while [[Ivey]] used a portable computer and [[comlink]] to draw off the authorities. Once they were safe, Stormcaller gave her 5000 credits and explained that he wanted her to find out the security protocols for the upcoming [[Lunar Night]] festivities. She initially refused, not wanting to get involved with a notorious [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary group]], but after finding out that the credits she got from Tok were now worthless she agreed to work with the Red Moons.<ref name="AJ3" />
